create-pdf-title-page-custom-font.title: Create PDF Title Page with Custom Font and Color
create-pdf-title-page-custom-font.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF, set document metadata, and add a centered title page using a custom font, size, and color with Aspose.Pdf.

insert-high-res-image-into-pdf.title: Insert High‑Resolution Image into PDF with Absolute Positioning
insert-high-res-image-into-pdf.description: Shows how to create a high‑resolution bitmap in memory, encode it as JPEG, and place it on a PDF page at specific coordinates using Aspose.Pdf.

create-searchable-pdf-from-scanned-image.title: Create Searchable PDF from Scanned Images using OCR Overlay
create-searchable-pdf-from-scanned-image.description: Shows how to load a scanned PDF, run OCR on each page to generate an invisible text layer, and save the result as a searchable PDF.

add-indented-paragraph-with-line-spacing.title: Add Indented Paragraph with Custom Line Spacing to PDF
add-indented-paragraph-with-line-spacing.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, create a TextParagraph with first‑line and subsequent‑line indentation, apply extra line spacing, and insert it onto a page using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-page-from-pdf.title: Remove a Page from PDF and Renumber Remaining Pages
remove-page-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to delete a specific page from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and automatically renumber the remaining pages before saving the result.

insert-blank-cover-page-into-pdf.title: Insert Blank Cover Page into PDF
insert-blank-cover-page-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, insert an empty page at the beginning as a cover sheet, and save the modified document.

replace-text-in-pdf-preserving-formattin.title: Replace Text in PDF While Preserving Formatting
replace-text-in-pdf-preserving-formattin.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, searching for a specific word using TextFragmentAbsorber, replacing each occurrence while keeping the original formatting, and saving the updated document.

extract-images-from-pdf-to-png.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save as PNG
extract-images-from-pdf-to-png.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF pages, retrieve embedded XImage resources, and render each image to a PNG file while preserving its original resolution using Aspose.Pdf.

add-digital-signature-to-pdf.title: Add Digital Signature Field and Sign PDF with Self‑Signed Certificate
add-digital-signature-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a signature field on a PDF page, configure a PKCS#7 self‑signed certificate, and apply the digital signature using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-pdf-a1a-compliance-report.title: Validate PDF for PDF/A-1A Compliance and Generate Report
validate-pdf-a1a-compliance-report.description: The example loads a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf, validates it against the PDF/A‑1A standard, and writes a detailed validation report to a text file.

validate-pdf-a1b-compliance.title: Validate PDF for PDF/A-1B Compliance with Aspose.Pdf
validate-pdf-a1b-compliance.description: Demonstrates how to validate a PDF file against PDF/A‑1B compliance using Aspose.Pdf, write a validation log, and check the compliance flag.

clean-pdf-remove-metadata-attachments-ja.title: Clean PDF by Removing Metadata, Attachments, and JavaScript
clean-pdf-remove-metadata-attachments-ja.description: Loads a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, strips all document metadata, embedded file attachments, and JavaScript actions, then optimizes resources and saves the cleaned file.

set-pdf-expiration-date.title: Set PDF Expiration Date with JavaScript
set-pdf-expiration-date.description: Shows how to embed a JavaScript action in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf so the document automatically closes after a specified expiration date.

flatten-pdf-form-fields.title: Flatten PDF Form Fields to Static Content
flatten-pdf-form-fields.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, flattening all interactive form fields into static content, and saving the resulting PDF.

check-pdf-incremental-updates.title: Check PDF for Incremental Updates using Aspose.Pdf
check-pdf-incremental-updates.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and determine whether it contains incremental updates, indicating post‑creation modifications.

convert-pdf-to-html.title: Convert PDF to HTML
convert-pdf-to-html.description: Loads a PDF document and saves it as an HTML file using Aspose.Pdf's Document and HtmlSaveOptions classes.

generate-accessible-pdf-with-tags.title: Generate Accessible PDF with Headings, Paragraphs, and Table
generate-accessible-pdf-with-tags.description: Shows how to create a PDF and add accessibility tags for a level‑1 heading, a paragraph, and a table using Aspose.Pdf's tagging API.

attach-pdf-portfolio-with-metadata.title: Attach PDF Portfolio and Set Custom Metadata
attach-pdf-portfolio-with-metadata.description: Demonstrates embedding a PDF as a portfolio (embedded file) into an existing PDF, adding an optional visible file attachment annotation, and setting custom XMP metadata and document information.

update-pdf-metadata-author-title.title: Update PDF Author and Title Metadata with Aspose.Pdf
update-pdf-metadata-author-title.description: Demonstrates how to read existing PDF metadata, change the Author and Title fields, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-with-user-owner-passwords.title: Encrypt PDF with User and Owner Passwords
encrypt-pdf-with-user-owner-passwords.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, apply AES‑256 encryption with separate user and owner passwords, set specific permissions, and save the protected document using Aspose.Pdf.

print-pdf-using-os-verb.title: Print PDF Document Using OS Print Verb
print-pdf-using-os-verb.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and dispatch it to the default printer using the operating system's "print" verb from a .NET application.

interrupt-resume-large-pdf-save.title: Interrupt and Resume Large PDF Save Operation
interrupt-resume-large-pdf-save.description: Shows how to cancel a long‑running PDF save using Aspose.Pdf's async API and an InterruptMonitor, then release resources and resume the save later.

generate-pdf-crash-report.title: Generate PDF Crash Report from an Exception
generate-pdf-crash-report.description: Shows how to capture an exception, create an HTML crash report with Aspose.Pdf's CrashReportOptions, and convert that report into a PDF file.

embed-zugferd-xml-into-pdf.title: Embed ZUGFeRD XML into PDF and Verify Attachment
embed-zugferd-xml-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to attach a ZUGFeRD XML file to an existing PDF as an invisible file‑attachment annotation, save the result, and confirm the embedded file using Aspose.Pdf's EmbeddedFiles collection.

add-javascript-open-action-to-pdf.title: Add JavaScript Open Action to PDF
add-javascript-open-action-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to embed a JavaScript action that shows an alert dialog when the PDF document is opened using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-from-multiple-html-fragments.title: Create PDF from Multiple HTML Fragments with Custom Options
create-pdf-from-multiple-html-fragments.description: Shows how to convert a collection of HTML strings into a single PDF document using Aspose.Pdf, applying custom HtmlLoadOptions and merging the generated pages.

add-styled-table-with-borders-to-pdf.title: Add Styled Table with Borders and Alternating Row Colors to PDF
add-styled-table-with-borders-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a table with a full border, header styling, and alternating row background colors, then inserting it into an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-hyperlink-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Hyperlink Annotation to PDF
add-hyperlink-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a clickable link annotation that opens an external website when clicked, using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-image-in-pdf-page.title: Replace Existing Image in PDF Page
replace-image-in-pdf-page.description: Shows how to replace an existing image resource on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf while preserving its layout, and how to add a new image when no images are present.

add-page-numbers-to-pdf-footer.title: Add Page Numbers to PDF Footer
add-page-numbers-to-pdf-footer.description: Shows how to insert dynamic page numbers in the footer of each PDF page using Aspose.Pdf's PageNumberStamp.

create-pdf-multiple-page-sizes-orientati.title: Create PDF with Multiple Page Sizes and Orientations
create-pdf-multiple-page-sizes-orientati.description: Demonstrates how to add pages with different sizes and portrait/landscape orientations to a single PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

merge-two-pdfs-preserve-bookmarks.title: Merge Two PDFs While Preserving Bookmarks
merge-two-pdfs-preserve-bookmarks.description: Shows how to combine two PDF files into a single document using Aspose.Pdf, keeping the outlines/bookmarks from both source PDFs.

extract-text-from-pdf-page-range.title: Extract Text from Specific PDF Page Range
extract-text-from-pdf-page-range.description: Shows how to extract text from a defined range of pages in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and write the result to a UTF‑8 text file.

add-company-logo-header-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Company Logo Header to PDF Pages
add-company-logo-header-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over all pages, and place an ImageStamp containing a company logo as a header on each page before saving the document.

set-pdf-document-metadata.title: Set PDF Document Metadata (Creation Date, Modification Date, Keywords)
set-pdf-document-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set its creation and modification dates, add custom keywords, and save the updated file.

create-pdf-with-embedded-truetype-font.title: Create PDF with Embedded TrueType Font
create-pdf-with-embedded-truetype-font.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF document and embed a TrueType font so the text renders consistently on any device.

apply-semi-transparent-image-watermark-t.title: Apply Semi-Transparent Image Watermark to PDF Pages
apply-semi-transparent-image-watermark-t.description: Demonstrates adding a semi‑transparent image overlay as a watermark to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-clickable-table-of-contents.title: Create PDF with Clickable Table of Contents
create-pdf-clickable-table-of-contents.description: Shows how to generate a PDF that includes a table of contents where each entry is a clickable link that jumps to its corresponding section page using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-all-annotations-from-pdf.title: Remove All Annotations from a PDF
remove-all-annotations-from-pdf.description: Loads a PDF document, iterates through each page, deletes every annotation, and saves a clean copy without any markup.

add-signature-field-to-pdf.title: Add Signature Field to PDF with Default Appearance
add-signature-field-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, set a default appearance for form fields, create a signature field, and add it to the document using Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-aes256-restrict-permissions.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Restrict Printing/Copying
encrypt-pdf-aes256-restrict-permissions.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑256 with Aspose.Pdf, set user and owner passwords, and limit permissions to prevent printing and copying.

create-pdf-portfolio.title: Create PDF Portfolio with Embedded PDFs
create-pdf-portfolio.description: Shows how to bundle several PDF files into a single PDF portfolio container using Aspose.Pdf.

add-custom-xml-xmp-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add Custom XML XMP Metadata to PDF
add-custom-xml-xmp-metadata-to-pdf.description: The example loads an existing PDF, adds custom key‑value pairs to the document information dictionary, creates custom XMP metadata as XML, embeds it into the PDF, and saves the modified file.

add-line-annotation-custom-color-thickne.title: Add Line Annotation with Custom Color and Thickness to PDF
add-line-annotation-custom-color-thickne.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a line annotation with a custom blue color and thickness, adding it to a page, and saving the modified document.

replace-pdf-page-with-html.title: Replace PDF Page with HTML-Generated Page
replace-pdf-page-with-html.description: Demonstrates how to replace a specific page in an existing PDF with a page generated from HTML using Aspose.Pdf's HTML conversion capabilities.

add-javascript-calculation-to-pdf-form-f.title: Add JavaScript Calculation to PDF Form Fields
add-javascript-calculation-to-pdf-form-f.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with two numeric fields and a read‑only sum field, then attaching a JavaScript action that calculates and displays the sum of the two fields.

create-pdf-dynamic-table.title: Create PDF with Dynamic Table from DataTable
create-pdf-dynamic-table.description: Demonstrates generating a PDF document with a table whose rows are populated from a DataTable, allowing the number of rows to vary dynamically.

create-zugferd-pdf-invoice.title: Create ZUGFeRD PDF Invoice with Embedded XML
create-zugferd-pdf-invoice.description: Shows how to build a simple invoice PDF, add text elements, embed a ZUGFeRD XML file, convert the document to ZUGFeRD format, and save the resulting PDF.

create-pdf-with-clickable-index.title: Create PDF with Clickable Index
create-pdf-with-clickable-index.description: Shows how to generate a PDF that contains an index page where each entry links to its corresponding section using Aspose.Pdf link annotations and GoTo actions.

add-reusable-background-image-to-all-pdf.title: Add Reusable Background Image to All PDF Pages
add-reusable-background-image-to-all-pdf.description: Shows how to use a single‑page PDF as a reusable background stamp and apply it to every page of another PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

add-custom-signature-appearance-last-pag.title: Add Custom Signature Appearance to Last PDF Page
add-custom-signature-appearance-last-pag.description: Shows how to create a signature field on the last page of a PDF and apply a custom signature image as its appearance using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-embedded-files-from-pdf-portfoli.title: Extract Embedded Files from PDF Portfolio
extract-embedded-files-from-pdf-portfoli.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a PDF portfolio's embedded files and save each one to a local directory, using Aspose.Pdf with reflection for flexibility.

create-magazine-pdf-with-text-and-image.title: Create Magazine‑Style PDF with Text and Advertisement Image
create-magazine-pdf-with-text-and-image.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF that mimics a magazine article layout by adding a block of text and placing an advertisement image in a right‑hand column.

create-read-only-text-field.title: Create Read‑Only Text Field with Default Value in PDF
create-read-only-text-field.description: Demonstrates how to add a text box form field to a PDF, set a default value, make it read‑only, and define its appearance using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-with-email-link.title: Create PDF with Clickable Email Link
create-pdf-with-email-link.description: Shows how to add a link annotation that opens the default mail client using a mailto: URI in a PDF generated with Aspose.Pdf.

add-captions-below-images-in-pdf.title: Add Captions Below Images in PDF
add-captions-below-images-in-pdf.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF pages, locate each image, and insert a styled text caption beneath it using Aspose.Pdf.

add-popup-note-annotation.title: Add Pop‑up Note Annotation to PDF
add-popup-note-annotation.description: Shows how to create a TextAnnotation (sticky‑note) with an associated PopupAnnotation that displays detailed information when the user hovers over the note.

pdf-header-current-date-javascript.title: Create PDF Header with Current Date Using JavaScript
pdf-header-current-date-javascript.description: Shows how to add a shared DateField in the header of a PDF and populate it with the current date via page‑level JavaScript using Aspose.Pdf.

digitally-sign-pdf-with-timestamp.title: Digitally Sign PDF with Timestamp from TSA
digitally-sign-pdf-with-timestamp.description: Demonstrates how to add a PKCS#7 digital signature to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and include a trusted Time‑Stamp Authority timestamp.

create-5x7-inch-postcard-pdf.title: Create a 5×7 Inch Postcard PDF
create-5x7-inch-postcard-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF with a custom 5×7‑inch page size suitable for postcard printing using Aspose.Pdf.

add-background-color-to-pdf-page.title: Add Background Color to PDF Page Using Rectangle with Opacity
add-background-color-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to apply a semi‑transparent background color to a PDF page by drawing a full‑page rectangle shape with opacity using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-pdf-page-into-another.title: Insert a PDF Page into Another PDF
insert-pdf-page-into-another.description: Demonstrates how to copy a specific page from one PDF document and insert it at a given position in another PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-with-dropdown-list.title: Create PDF with Dropdown List (ComboBox)
create-pdf-with-dropdown-list.description: Shows how to generate a PDF containing a form ComboBox populated from an array using Aspose.Pdf.

add-page-number-footer-to-pdf.title: Add Page Number Footer to PDF
add-page-number-footer-to-pdf.description: Shows how to add a custom footer that displays "Page X of Y" on every page of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-javascript-from-pdf.title: Remove JavaScript from PDF Document
remove-javascript-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to strip all JavaScript actions—including document‑level, page‑level, and annotation‑level scripts—from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then saves the cleaned file.

merged-header-table-pdf.title: Create PDF with Merged Header Table
merged-header-table-pdf.description: Shows how to generate a PDF that contains a header table with a single cell spanning multiple columns, followed by a regular data table, using Aspose.Pdf.

add-link-annotation-open-pdf-attachment.title: Create Link Annotation to Open PDF Attachment
add-link-annotation-open-pdf-attachment.description: Demonstrates how to add a link annotation to a PDF page that opens an external PDF attachment when clicked, using Aspose.Pdf's GoToRemoteAction.

create-landscape-pdf-page.title: Create Landscape PDF Page with Rotation
create-landscape-pdf-page.description: Shows how to generate a PDF page in landscape orientation by setting the page size, marking it as landscape, applying a 90‑degree rotation, and adding sample text.

add-checked-checkbox-form-field.title: Add Checked Checkbox Form Field to PDF
add-checked-checkbox-form-field.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF document, adding a checkbox form field, setting its default state to checked, and saving the file.

extract-pdf-outline-hierarchy.title: Extract and Print PDF Outline Hierarchy
extract-pdf-outline-hierarchy.description: Shows how to create a PDF with bookmarks (outlines) and then read and display the outline hierarchy using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-table-with-rich-text-formatti.title: Create PDF Table with Rich Text Formatting
create-pdf-table-with-rich-text-formatti.description: Shows how to generate a PDF containing a table where each cell displays text with different styles such as bold, italic, underline, and colored fonts using Aspose.Pdf.

add-diagonal-text-stamp-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Diagonal Text Stamp to PDF Pages
add-diagonal-text-stamp-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, creating a TextStamp with a custom message, configuring its appearance and rotation, and applying it as a watermark to every page before saving.

insert-automatic-page-numbers-into-pdf.title: Insert Automatic Page Numbers into PDF
insert-automatic-page-numbers-into-pdf.description: Shows how to add a page number stamp to a PDF, apply it to existing and newly inserted pages, and update pagination so the numbers adjust automatically.

create-pdf-with-background-template.title: Create PDF with Background Template Page
create-pdf-with-background-template.description: Shows how to use a page from an existing PDF as a background template for multiple new pages using Aspose.Pdf.

add-visible-signature-field-and-lock-pdf.title: Add Visible Signature Field and Lock PDF after Signing
add-visible-signature-field-and-lock-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a visible signature field in a PDF, sign it with a PKCS#7 certificate, and lock the document to prevent further modifications.

extract-text-from-pdf-to-utf8-file.title: Extract Text from PDF and Save as UTF-8 File
extract-text-from-pdf-to-utf8-file.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract all textual content using a TextAbsorber, and write the result to a UTF‑8 encoded text file.

create-pdf-with-radio-button-form.title: Create PDF with Radio Button Form
create-pdf-with-radio-button-form.description: Shows how to generate a PDF containing a multiple‑choice question by adding a RadioButtonField with several options using Aspose.Pdf and saving the document.

add-javascript-total-calculation-to-pdf-.title: Add JavaScript Total Calculation to PDF Form Fields
add-javascript-total-calculation-to-pdf-.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically attach a JavaScript calculate action to PDF form fields using Aspose.Pdf, creating a read‑only total field that sums specified numeric fields.

extract-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.title: Extract XMP Metadata from PDF to XML
extract-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, retrieve its embedded XMP metadata, and save it as an XML file.

create-multi-page-table-pdf.title: Create Multi‑Page Table in PDF with Aspose.Pdf
create-multi-page-table-pdf.description: Shows how to generate a PDF containing a table that automatically splits across multiple pages, with a repeating header row, using Aspose.Pdf.

add-line-separator-annotation-to-pdf-pag.title: Add Line Separator Annotation to PDF Page
add-line-separator-annotation-to-pdf-pag.description: Demonstrates how to insert a horizontal line annotation as a visual separator on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-pdf-pages-90-degrees.title: Rotate PDF Pages 90 Degrees for Portrait Display
rotate-pdf-pages-90-degrees.description: Loads a PDF document, sets each page's rotation to 90 degrees so it appears in portrait orientation on landscape devices, and saves the modified file.

create-pdf-with-date-picker-form-field.title: Create PDF with Date Picker Form Field
create-pdf-with-date-picker-form-field.description: Shows how to add a date picker (DateField) to a PDF, set its format and appearance, and save the document using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-hyperlinks-from-pdf.title: Extract Hyperlinks from PDF to Text File
extract-hyperlinks-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages and link annotations, collect external URI actions, and write the URLs to a plain‑text file.

load-pdf-into-document.title: Load PDF into Document
load-pdf-into-document.description: Shows how to load a PDF file into an Aspose.Pdf Document object and retrieve basic information such as page count.

remove-all-annotations-from-pdf__v2.title: Remove All Annotations from PDF
remove-all-annotations-from-pdf__v2.description: Loads a PDF document, iterates through each page, deletes all annotations, and saves the sanitized file.

sanitize-pdf-remove-embedded-scripts.title: Sanitize PDF by Removing Embedded Scripts
sanitize-pdf-remove-embedded-scripts.description: Demonstrates how to configure Aspose.Pdf's hidden data sanitization to delete embedded JavaScript and actions from a PDF before saving the sanitized document.

sanitize-pdf-remove-metadata-private-inf.title: Sanitize PDF by Removing Metadata and Private Info
sanitize-pdf-remove-metadata-private-inf.description: Demonstrates how to clear PDF metadata, compliance flags, and private search index data using Aspose.Pdf's optimization options.

convert-pdf-to-html-with-rasterized-page.title: Convert PDF to HTML with Rasterized Pages
convert-pdf-to-html-with-rasterized-page.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to HTML while rasterizing each page as external PNG images using Aspose.Pdf's HtmlSaveOptions.

convert-pdf-pages-to-jpeg-quality-80.title: Convert PDF Pages to JPEG Images with 80% Quality
convert-pdf-pages-to-jpeg-quality-80.description: The example loads a PDF, applies JPEG compression with quality 80 to embedded images, and then converts each page to a high‑resolution JPEG file using a JpegDevice.

convert-pdf-pages-to-jpeg-no-compression.title: Convert PDF Pages to JPEG Without Image Compression
convert-pdf-pages-to-jpeg-no-compression.description: Loads a PDF, disables image compression during optimization, and exports each page as a high‑quality JPEG image, preserving the original image data.

convert-pdf-pages-to-jpeg-images.title: Convert PDF Pages to JPEG Images
convert-pdf-pages-to-jpeg-images.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and convert each page into a separate JPEG image file saved to a directory.

remove-annotations-attachments-from-pdf.title: Remove Annotations and Attachments from PDF
remove-annotations-attachments-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to strip all comments, markup, and embedded files from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then optimizes resources and saves the cleaned document.

sanitize-multiple-pdfs.title: Sanitize Multiple PDFs and Save Cleaned Versions
sanitize-multiple-pdfs.description: Demonstrates loading all PDF files from a folder, removing metadata, compliance tags, form fields, and unused resources, then saving the sanitized copies to a target directory using Aspose.Pdf.

generate-crash-report-for-pdf-exceptions.title: Generate Crash Report for PDF Exceptions
generate-crash-report-for-pdf-exceptions.description: Demonstrates how to catch a PdfException, configure CrashReportOptions, and generate an HTML crash report file using Aspose.Pdf.

customize-crash-report-filename.title: Customize Crash Report Filename and Message with Aspose.Pdf
customize-crash-report-filename.description: Shows how to set a custom message and override the default filename when generating an HTML crash report using Aspose.Pdf's CrashReportOptions.

specify-crash-report-output-directory.title: Specify Crash Report Output Directory and Verify Generation
specify-crash-report-output-directory.description: Shows how to set a custom directory and filename for an Aspose.Pdf crash report, generate the report, and confirm the file exists.

handle-pdf-errors-generate-crash-report.title: Handle PDF Errors and Generate Crash Report
handle-pdf-errors-generate-crash-report.description: The example loads a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, performs simple processing, and demonstrates robust error handling by catching PdfException and generic exceptions, then creates a detailed HTML crash report.

create-pdf-with-level-1-heading.title: Create PDF with Level 1 Heading
create-pdf-with-level-1-heading.description: Shows how to create a new PDF document, add a level‑1 heading using the tagged content API, and save the file.

create-hierarchical-numbered-headings.title: Create Hierarchical Numbered Headings in PDF
create-hierarchical-numbered-headings.description: Shows how to add Heading objects with automatic decimal (Arabic) numbering and proper hierarchical sequencing to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-structured-headings-to-pdf.title: Add Structured Headings to PDF
add-structured-headings-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF, add Heading objects with different levels and automatic numbering, and save the document, building a simple table of contents.

add-heading-to-pdf-outline.title: Add Heading to PDF Outline (Bookmark)
add-heading-to-pdf-outline.description: Demonstrates how to insert a new outline (bookmark) into an existing PDF and set its destination to a specific page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-dynamic-heading-to-pdf.title: Add Dynamic Heading to PDF Document
add-dynamic-heading-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an existing PDF, creating a heading with dynamic content (date and user name), inserting it at the top of the first page, and saving the updated file.

create-sanitize-pdf-with-auto-numbered-h.title: Create and Sanitize PDF with Auto‑Numbered Headings
create-sanitize-pdf-with-auto-numbered-h.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF containing auto‑numbered headings and then sanitize the document by removing annotations, metadata, and flattening form fields while preserving the heading structure.

remove-hidden-data-reapply-headings.title: Remove Hidden Data and Re‑Apply Headings in a PDF
remove-hidden-data-reapply-headings.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, stripping hidden metadata, outlines, and unused resources, then enabling auto‑tagging to recreate heading structures for proper navigation before saving the cleaned file.

batch-sanitize-pdfs.title: Batch Sanitize PDFs and Save Cleaned Copies
batch-sanitize-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over a folder of PDF files, remove metadata and compliance flags, optimize each document, and save the sanitized versions to a separate directory using Aspose.Pdf.

sanitize-pdf-remove-metadata.title: Sanitize PDF by Removing Metadata and Flattening Content
sanitize-pdf-remove-metadata.description: Demonstrates a console application that loads a PDF, removes hidden metadata, compliance information, flattens forms, optimizes resources, and saves a sanitized copy.

detect-hidden-annotations-in-pdf.title: Detect Hidden Annotations in a PDF
detect-hidden-annotations-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and iterating through its pages and annotations to determine if any annotation has the Hidden flag set.

sanitize-pdf-remove-hidden-content-keep-.title: Sanitize PDF by Removing Hidden Content While Keeping Metadata
sanitize-pdf-remove-hidden-content-keep-.description: Shows how to configure Aspose.Pdf's optimization options to strip hidden data such as private info, unused objects/streams, and PDF/A/UA compliance markers while preserving the document metadata.

rasterize-pdf-to-png-lossless-compressio.title: Rasterize PDF Pages to PNG with Lossless Compression
rasterize-pdf-to-png-lossless-compressio.description: The example loads a PDF, configures ImageCompressionOptions for lossless PNG output, optimizes the document, and rasterizes each page to PNG files at a specified DPI.

convert-pdf-pages-to-high-resolution-tif.title: Convert PDF Pages to High-Resolution TIFF Images
convert-pdf-pages-to-high-resolution-tif.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and convert each page to a TIFF file at a specified DPI using TiffDevice and resolution settings.

test-convert-pages-to-images.title: Test ConvertPagesToImages Generates Images per PDF Page
test-convert-pages-to-images.description: Shows a unit test that creates two identical PDFs, uses Aspose.Pdf's graphical comparer to export each page as an image, and asserts that an image file is generated for every page.

create-pdf-roman-headings-validation.title: Create PDF with Roman Numeral Chapter Headings and Validate Order
create-pdf-roman-headings-validation.description: Demonstrates generating a PDF where each page has a chapter heading formatted as a Roman numeral, then extracts the headings to verify the sequence is correct.

auto-tagging-and-headings-pdf.title: Create Clean Navigable PDF with Auto‑Tagging and Headings
auto-tagging-and-headings-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to enable Aspose.Pdf auto‑tagging for PDF sanitization, set document metadata, and programmatically add heading and paragraph elements to build a navigable structure tree.

generate-pdf-crash-report__v2.title: Generate PDF Crash Report with Custom Message
generate-pdf-crash-report__v2.description: Demonstrates catching a PDF loading error and creating an HTML crash report using Aspose.Pdf's CrashReportOptions with a custom message.

generate-crash-report-to-network-share.title: Generate Crash Report to Network Share with Aspose.Pdf
generate-crash-report-to-network-share.description: Shows how to configure CrashReportOptions to write an Aspose.Pdf crash report to a network share, with fallback to a local folder and verification of the generated file.

pdf-sanitization-audit-log.title: PDF Sanitization with Auditing Log
pdf-sanitization-audit-log.description: Demonstrates how to sanitize a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, record the operation's start and end timestamps, and write an audit entry to a log file.
